name: Super Productivity
description: An efficient way to manage tasks, time, and projects all in one place
compose:
name: slashnode-super-productivity
services:
  web:
    image: johannesjo/super-productivity:v18.12.0
    container_name: super-productivity
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8020:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
